query: SELECT enrichmentSource, verificationStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(AVG(verificationScore),1) as avgScore FROM contacts GROUP BY enrichmentSource, verificationStatus ORDER BY enrichmentSource, verificationStatus;
